refined_caption: The hospital privacy curtain in the room is visibly torn and damaged. The tear appears to be significant, potentially compromising patient privacy.
complaint_description: I was admitted to the hospital and was shocked to see that the privacy curtain in my room was torn and damaged. This is a concern for me as it may compromise my privacy during my stay. I hope the hospital can replace or repair it as soon as possible.
voice_text: The privacy curtain in my hospital room is all torn, can someone please fix it or replace it?
